name: Osman
product_description: Helps early-stage B2B SaaS founders generate inbound and revenue through LinkedIn and founder-led marketing.

company_types: Technical founders building their first company
pain_points: No inbound pipeline - relying only on outbound
Struggling to stand out on LinkedIn
Don't know how to build personal brand as founder
Founder is too busy to create content consistently

content_themes: Why founder-led marketing beats traditional B2B marketing
LinkedIn content that actually drives pipeline
Building authentic personal brand as a founder
The leverage of being the face of your company
Why early-stage founders should invest in content

voice.tone: Dharmesh Shah-style - approachable, witty, uses data and stories, self-deprecating humor, genuine not polished, occasionally contrarian but backed by experience
